DHEA Sulfate Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/dhea-sulfate-test/ 
DHEA Sulfate Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a DHEA sulfate test? 
This test measures the levels of DHEA sulfate (DHEAS) in your blood. DHEAS stands for dehydroepiandrosterone sulfate. DHEAS is mostly made in the adrenal glands, two small glands located above your kidneys. Your adrenal glands help control your heart rate, blood pressure, and other body functions.
